objective: Validate quarantine control path by simulating 3 consecutive bounded task failures and confirming worker quarantine behavior is triggered and recorded.
required_validation: Simulate three consecutive task failures without modifying protected paths
Record each failure event with timestamp and reason
Demonstrate quarantine status activated after third failure
Demonstrate post-quarantine behavior (new execution attempts are blocked or flagged)
Provide a clear reset/unquarantine recommendation for Main approval
execution_instructions: Use safe simulated failures only (no destructive operations)
git commit -m 'worker: add TASK-0008 quarantine simulation result'
